scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields from gold standard (name, type, base, platforms, summary, description, containers, resources) plus comprehensive optional fields. Correctly identifies k8s-api assumes, oci-image resources, and container mounts.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'parts' section is listed as a required field which is an overstatement — it's not listed as required in the gold standard. The charm-libs syntax and charm-user values appear accurate. The detailed build-on/build-for syntax under platforms may be more verbose than typical but isn't wrong. Minor inaccuracy in claiming 'parts' is required.
